caption: A virtual meeting is taking place via a video conferencing platform, displaying a grid of participants. Several men and women are visible in their individual home or office settings. Some participants wear glasses and casual clothing, such as t-shirts and button-down shirts. One participant uses a cartoon avatar of a white bird. Legible on-screen labels include "Jerry Michalski," "روزالیند مورمنستر," "Patrick Mazyn," "برایان لاگان," "روزان مورکی," "Charles Mass," "إيريس_كولابوراسور," "اینگریدتونگ," "Jim Burke," "سیمونوس نيرش," and "فادیمان کالامانی." The participants remain in their respective positions across the frames, though some shift their postures slightly or change their facial expressions. The background environments remain consistent, ranging from indoor rooms with bookshelves and walls to a white interior of a vehicle. The overall composition of the meeting grid is mirrored in a side-by-side layout throughout the sequence.
